chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-764 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, advocate for petitioner Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani, Assistant Attorney General *** Through this petition, petitioner seeks annual award on account of achieving highest marks amongst Assistants of South Zone. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner is working as Assistant in National Highways Authority. He further submits in terms of the National Highways & Motorway Police (Road Safety Campaigns Performance Award Fund) Rules 2007 the petitioner compete in the year 20022 and he secured 270 marks and was accordingly recommended for subject award, but till date he was not been given award. Learned Assistant Attorney General submits that representation/appeal of the petitioner in this regard is pending before Inspector General National Highways Authority, therefore, it would be appropriate that directions may be issued to the I.G NHA for deciding the same within two months. Upon being confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner extended no objection and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with directions to competent authority of NHA to decide the pending representation/appeal of petitioner within two months from today strictly in accordance with law. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to Inspector General National Highways Authority for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
